ocr_findings.description: Lesson header 'Lesson 02-01' and page number '54' captured correctly. Inline color/bold formatting (e.g. orange text for 著作権, 不正アクセス禁止法, 情報公開法) is lost but this is cosmetic in markdown.

reviewer_notes: Page is Lesson 02-01 introducing 知的財産権 and 著作権. OCR text faithfully reproduces all body paragraphs and section headings. The decorative illustration (brain/chest image) is represented as an img placeholder, which is acceptable. No content loss detected.
